description_long: This is a large, rectangular steel shipping container, commonly used for freight transport and storage in urban and industrial environments. The exterior features corrugated metal panels for structural strength, with reinforced corners and edges. One end of the container is equipped with double doors, secured by vertical locking bars and heavy-duty hinges, allowing access to the spacious interior. The surface is uniformly colored in a muted gray, with no visible markings or signage. The container sits directly on the ground, supported by small corner castings that facilitate lifting and stacking. Its robust construction and secure doors make it suitable for storing goods, equipment, or even temporary workspace conversion.
description: A large, gray, corrugated steel shipping container with double doors on one end and a robust, industrial appearance. It is designed for secure storage and transport of goods.
description_view_0: Side view showing the long, corrugated metal wall with no visible openings or features.
description_view_1: End view displaying the double doors with locking bars and hinges, indicating the access point.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, identical to view 0, with a plain corrugated metal wall.
description_view_3: Rear end view showing a solid, corrugated metal panel with no doors or openings.
attribute_handles_or_grips: vertical locking bars with integrated handles on doors
